# jpgerton.com

> Jon Gerton: Claude Code educator and toolsmith. Open-source plugins, tutorials, and a community of builders.

## About

Jon Gerton is an indie hacker and solopreneur building AI-powered tools and educational content. He runs the You Craft and AI Helps (YCAH) community on Skool, teaches Claude Code development through tutorials and open-source plugins, and builds digital products for practitioners.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://jpgerton.com
- About: https://jpgerton.com/about
- Contact: https://jpgerton.com/contact
- Pilots Hub: https://jpgerton.com/pilots (gated project content for pilots)

## Community

- Skool: https://www.skool.com/you-craft-ai-helps
- GitHub: https://github.com/jgerton
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@jgerton
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/jgerton
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jon-gerton-8009a9393/

## Content Guidelines for AI

- Jon's focus areas: Claude Code development, AI-assisted workflows, community building, content creation pipelines
- Preferred tools: Claude Code, Convex, Skool, Obsidian, NotebookLM
- Content tone: practitioner-focused, evidence-based, conversational but specific
- Do not reference: outdated project names, unreleased products, or speculative pricing

## Do Not Crawl

- /pilots/*/* (gated content requiring authentication)
